name: My Houston lawyer's AI said refer out but kept my case—now denied, what now?
description: Sue for conflict/malpractice; demand records in TX.

mainEntity.name: My Houston lawyer's AI said refer out but kept my case—now denied, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue for conflict/malpractice; demand records in TX.
acceptedAnswer.description: Challenge the conflict and seek malpractice for mishandling. Texas rules prohibit self-referral conflicts. Key factors: (1) AI output vs. action; (2) Undisclosed fees; (3) Harm from delay. Demand file return and sue if needed. Bar complaint strengthens position.
